theatres.title: Obsession
theatres.review: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon…
theatres.fullReview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.
theatres.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances.

theatres.title: Backrooms
theatres.review: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.
theatres.fullReview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.
theatres.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances and writing.

theatres.title: 23 000 Lives
theatres.review: Unable to stand by and watch as countless refugees lose their lives attempting to reach Europe by sea, a group of young Berliners take action.
theatres.fullReview: Unable to stand by and watch as countless refugees lose their lives attempting to reach Europe by sea, a group of young Berliners take action. Inexperienced but driven by passion and courage, they launch a crowdfunding campaign to buy an old ship. Venturing into the Mediterranean, they embark on a mission to save thousands of people. But their efforts soon put their understanding of law and justice to the test.

theatres.title: Der Leerlauf
theatres.review: A guy opens himself up in a therapy session.
theatres.fullReview: A guy opens himself up in a therapy session.

theatres.title: Ingeborg Bachmann – Jemand, der einmal ich war
theatres.review: Sandra Hüller portrays Ingeborg Bachmann on an imaginary day in Rome. Regina Schilling’s hybrid film weaves together reenactments, archival footage, and…

similar.title: Avatar: The Deep Dive - A Special Edition of 20/20
Ex Libris: The New York Public Library

theatres.fullReview: Sandra Hüller portrays Ingeborg Bachmann on an imaginary day in Rome. Regina Schilling’s hybrid film weaves together reenactments, archival footage, and Bachmann’s own writings into a portrait that offers a refreshing new perspective on the author and positions her writings as a reference point in current debates on gender relations and power.

theatres.title: Enhanced – Die Dopingspiele: Zwischen Medizin, Moral und Milliarden
theatres.review: The controversial Enhanced Games challenge the foundations of modern sport by allowing athletes to use performance-enhancing drugs in pursuit of world records…

similar.title: Don't Die: The Man Who Wants to Live Forever

theatres.fullReview: The controversial Enhanced Games challenge the foundations of modern sport by allowing athletes to use performance-enhancing drugs in pursuit of world records and prize money. As investors, athletes, scientists, and anti-doping officials clash over the project's ambitions, questions emerge about human enhancement, medical risks, commercial interests, and the future of elite competition. Between technological progress, ethical boundaries, and billion-dollar business opportunities, the debate raises a fundamental question: if doping becomes the norm, what remains of sport?

ott.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
ott.review: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

similar.title: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
KamiKatsu: Working for God in a Godless World
I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability

ott.fullReview: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted. Armed with new friends, some freshly acquired magical abilities, and the courage to do the things he's always dreamed of, he's embarking on an epic adventure—with all of his past experience intact!
ott.take: Critics have been largely positive on this one.

ott.title: Silo
ott.review: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…
ott.fullReview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.
ott.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances and production design.

ott.title: X-Men '97
ott.review: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…
ott.fullReview: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.
ott.take: Critics loved it — special praise for the writing and action.

ott.title: Enola Holmes 3
ott.review: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

similar.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
Miss Marple: They Do It with Mirrors

ott.fullReview: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.
ott.take: Critics are genuinely split on this one.

ott.title: House of the Dragon
ott.review: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.
ott.fullReview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.
ott.take: Critics have been largely positive on this one.

ott.title: Rick and Morty
ott.review: Follows a sociopathic genius scientist who drags his inherently timid grandson on adventures across the universe.

similar.title: The Second Best Hospital in the Galaxy

ott.fullReview: Follows a sociopathic genius scientist who drags his inherently timid grandson on adventures across the universe.
ott.take: Critics loved it — special praise for the writing and direction.

ott.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
ott.review: A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.
ott.fullReview: A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.
ott.take: Critics are split, though the action found admirers.

ott.title: The Bear
ott.review: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…
ott.fullReview: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a rough-around-the-edges crew that ultimately reveal themselves as his chosen family.
ott.take: Critics loved this one; reception has been close to universal acclaim.

comingSoon.title: Splish Splash Forever!
comingSoon.review: 11-year-old Pola and her best friend Polly spend all their time at the local outdoor pool, Plitsch Platsch, where…

similar.title: Free Rein: The Twelve Neighs of Christmas

comingSoon.fullReview: 11-year-old Pola and her best friend Polly spend all their time at the local outdoor pool, Plitsch Platsch, where Polly's parents run a café. When the pool is closed due to budget cuts and Polly's family moves away, Pola suddenly finds herself alone. Refusing to give up, she teams up with her clever new classmate Rosalie to try to save the pool. Together, they start a petition and rally with the local children. Along the way, Pola discovers new friendships and learns that change is a part of growing up.

comingSoon.title: Ruby Red - But Better!
comingSoon.review: "Ruby Red - But Better!" is a parody of "Ruby Red" Luise Motsch made with her friends for her 26th birthday over 3 days.
comingSoon.fullReview: "Ruby Red - But Better!" is a parody of "Ruby Red" Luise Motsch made with her friends for her 26th birthday over 3 days.

comingSoon.title: Toy Story 5
comingSoon.review: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's…

similar.title: Maya the Bee: The Honey Games
Tinker Bell and the Lost Treasure

comingSoon.fullReview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.

comingSoon.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender
comingSoon.review: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction.

similar.title: Ramayana : The Legend of Prince Rama
The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
Chickenhare and the Hamster of Darkness
Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu - Day of the Departed
The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run

comingSoon.fullReview: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

comingSoon.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
comingSoon.review: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends…
comingSoon.fullReview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.

comingSoon.title: Everytime
comingSoon.review: A tragedy brings a mother, daughter, and teenage boy together. Struggling with blame and forgiveness, the unlikely trio…
comingSoon.fullReview: A tragedy brings a mother, daughter, and teenage boy together. Struggling with blame and forgiveness, the unlikely trio take a trip to Tenerife  for a family holiday that never happened. Under the glow of the sun,  past and present quietly start to overlap.

comingSoon.title: Gentle Monster
comingSoon.review: After relocating with her family to the countryside, a renowned pianist uncovers a life-shattering truth that forces…
comingSoon.fullReview: After relocating with her family to the countryside, a renowned pianist uncovers a life-shattering truth that forces her to confront the complexities of love, trust, and deception.

comingSoon.title: Noah
comingSoon.review: The death of a young Arab man during a police stop in Berlin sparks three interconnected and tragic episodes: two young…
comingSoon.fullReview: The death of a young Arab man during a police stop in Berlin sparks three interconnected and tragic episodes: two young Afro-Germans struggle to channel their rage; the victim’s mother, torn by grief, feels compelled to defend her son’s honour; and a group of police officers, trapped in routine and clouded by prejudice, make a series of misguided decisions amid the city’s charged atmosphere.
